warnings: Trend and frequency stay unknown until at least 3 comparable artifact-backed cases exist with the same shape.
comparable_cases[] reflects only artifact-backed dashboard cases that share a comparable shape; differently shaped cases are explicitly excluded from the count.
Dashboard and API surfaces show 'cases needed' when the threshold is not met rather than rendering a fake trend.
failure_prevented: Trend or frequency rendering as if it had statistical meaning when fewer than 3 comparable artifact-backed cases exist; per-failure trend lines being drawn from a single case.
signal_improved: Trend and frequency stay unknown below the threshold; cases_needed is explicit; blocked_trend_fields enumerate every API/dashboard field that would otherwise render a fake trend.

blocked_trend_fields.reason: Trend label remains unknown unless 3 comparable cases share the same shape; in this seeded loop the 3 cases are different shapes so per-shape trend is still unknown.
Per-failure-mode trend cannot be inferred from a single seeded case; trend stays unknown until 3 comparable artifact-backed cases per failure mode exist.
Frequency-of-expiry inference requires 3+ comparable expired items; below the threshold the count is exposed but no trend is drawn.
